Sohan's Space

Hey there, I'm Sohan 👋
I build things with AI and sometimes write about them.

  • Based in: Bangalore
  • Interests: code, AI, sports, whatever feels fun
  • Currently: Studying CSE at MIT (Not Massachusetts, Manipal 🙃)
  • Learning: Reinforcement learning and LLM optimization
  • Goal: Building AI systems that are safe, responsible and generalizable
  • Projects: Training an RL agent to trade, experimenting with document retrieval using knowledge graphs.
  • Little Secret: My GPU and I are in a committed relationship.
